title: Financial institutions and markets, their roles and services
description: Practice your understanding of financial institutions and markets, their roles and services.
topic_path: Financial institutions and markets, their roles and services

assessment_items.question_content:
Financial institutions and markets play important roles in our economy. They help people save money, get approved for loans, and invest in businesses.

**What is the primary role of a bank?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: to provide a safe place for people to store their money
to make all the important financial decisions for the country

assessment_items.question_content:
Financial institutions and markets are key parts of our society. They play a role in helping us save, invest, and borrow money. 

**What do financial markets do?**


[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: offer a place for people to buy and sell stocks and bonds

assessment_items.question_content:
Financial institutions and markets play important roles in our economy. They help people save money, get approved for loans, and invest in businesses.

**What is the primary role of banks?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: offering a place for people to buy and sell stocks and bonds

assessment_items.question_content:
Financial institutions provide a variety of services to help people manage their money.

**Which financial institutions can you use for saving money or opening a checking account? **

[[☃ radio 1]]

Financial institutions provide a variety of services to help people manage their money.

**Which financial institutions can give you a loan? **

[[☃ radio 1]]

Financial institutions provide a variety of services to help people manage their money.

**Which financial institutions help with investment planning? **

[[☃ radio 1]]

Financial markets are places where different types of things (like stocks, bonds, or commodities) are [[☃ definition 1]].

**Which market offers shares of different companies for trade?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Financial markets are places where different types of things (like stocks, bonds, or commodities) are [[☃ definition 1]].

**Which market offers bonds for trade?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Financial markets are places where different types of things (like stocks, bonds, or commodities) are [[☃ definition 1]].

**Which market offers short-term investments for trade?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

You have a goal to save up for your first car, which costs $\$5{,}000$. You want to find an institution that will help you save your money and grow it over time so you can reach your goal faster. 

**Which type of financial institution can help you with this?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

You want to start investing in [[☃ definition 1]] companies. You are aware of high risk but are more interested in the possibility of high returns. You want to find an institution that will help you make this investment.

**Which type of financial institution can help you with this?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

You have a goal to save for an emergency fund. You want to find an institution that will help you save your money and grow it over time so you can reach your goal faster. 

**Which type of financial institution can help you with this?**
